_note:
Per-tier pricing keyed by service_tier slug. Schema per entry:
  amount: number (USD whole dollars)
  interval: 'one-time' | 'monthly' | 'quarterly' | 'yearly' | 'project'
  starting_at: boolean (true => prefix with 'Starting at'; false => exact)
  setup_fee: number | null (one-time fee in addition to recurring)
  note: string | null (one-line clarification shown under the price)
Tiers without an entry render a 'Schedule a call to scope pricing' CTA instead of a price card. Add entries here as we recover them from the WP DB.
